creator: flo@smeets.im
text:
On 27.06.12 07:00, edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Convert lang/php53 to OptionsNG
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->flo
> Responsible-Changed-By: edwin
> Responsible-Changed-When: Wed Jun 27 12:00:49 UTC 2012
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> Over to maintainer (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)
> 

I have lang/php53 converted to options-ng in my cvs branch, but i did
not want to commit it two days before leaving on a 2 week vacation. If
someone wants to review/test/commit this and ports/169484 be my guest, I
cannot do so before 05.07.2012.

Florian
